_note: VERIFIED against live bsky.app (logged in) via DOM inspection: item roots are data-testid="feedItem-by-<handle>"; profile tabs are CLIENT-SIDE (the URL never changes) and are reached by clicking [role="tab"]:has([data-testid="profilePager-<Label>"]); posts/reposts/likes deletion controls confirmed working. Bluesky has NO <time datetime> — the date lives in the permalink anchor's data-tooltip/aria-label as prose (e.g. "July 19, 2026 at 4:56 PM"). Unverified: undoRepostMenuItem's exact testid (menu-only). Each entry is either a bare selector string or { selector, intent }; the intent is the plain-language description handed to the LLM when the selector needs repair, so it lives beside the selector rather than in a mirrored table in code.

postItem.intent: the root container element of a post / feed item

repostItem.intent: the root container element of a reposted feed item

replyItem.intent: the root container element of a reply feed item

likeItem.intent: the root container element of a liked post feed item

menuButton.intent: the button that opens a post's options / overflow menu

deleteMenuItem.intent: the "Delete post" item inside the open post options menu

deleteConfirm.intent: the confirm button in the delete-confirmation dialog

unlikeButton.intent: the like / unlike toggle button on a post

repostIndicator.intent: the "Reposted by …" label shown above a reposted feed item

repostButton.intent: the repost button on a post (opens the repost / undo-repost menu)

undoRepostMenuItem.intent: the "Undo repost" item inside the open repost menu

itemTimestamp.intent: the element inside a post that carries its date — on Bluesky the post's permalink anchor, whose data-tooltip/aria-label holds the full date as prose (there is no time[datetime] element)

tabPosts.intent: the "Posts" tab control in the profile page tab bar

tabReplies.intent: the "Replies" tab control in the profile page tab bar

tabLikes.intent: the "Likes" tab control in the profile page tab bar

dismissControls.intent: the close / dismiss button of a modal dialog, popup or toast
